Gucci Jackie series small shoulder bag
This piece is from the Gucci Lido series, inspired by the Italian coast's summer vibes and beach clubs. Crafted in patent leather, this Gucci Jackie handbag showcases the brand's exquisite craftsmanship, crescent shape, and stylish design. Pale gold-tone hardware and a matching strap with red and green webbing add more styling possibilities to this pale green small shoulder bag.
Model: 782849
Color: Pale Green Patent Leather
Size: 27.5x19x4cm
